name: forge-ai/mcp-router
description: Typed McpRouter port + InMemoryMcpRouter reference implementation for FORA MCP framework 0.3. Discriminated McpError union, ServerManifest schema, per-server circuit breaker, tenant scope gate, single-file acceptance harness for FORA-48. See FORA-48 §3.1 / FORA-444 / FORA-450.
